allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=[p for p in d['packages'] if p['name']=='relic']; print\(r[0] if r else 'relic not found'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'], p['latestVersion']\) for p in data['packages']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d.get\('pubspec',{}\); print\('deps:', p.get\('dependencies',{}\)\); print\('sdk:', p.get\('environment',{}\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d.get\('pubspec',{}\); print\('deps:', p.get\('dependencies',{}\)\); print\('sdk:', p.get\('environment',{}\)\); print\('flutter?:', 'flutter' in str\(p.get\('dependencies',{}\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['package']\) for p in data.get\('packages',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) latest = data.get\('latest', {}\) pubspec = latest.get\('pubspec', {}\) print\('Name:', pubspec.get\('name'\)\) print\('Version:', pubspec.get\('version'\)\) print\('Description:', pubspec.get\('description'\)\) print\('Dependencies:', json.dumps\(pubspec.get\('dependencies', {}\), indent=2\)\) print\('Platforms:', json.dumps\(pubspec.get\('platforms', {}\), indent=2\)\) print\('Environment:', json.dumps\(pubspec.get\('environment', {}\), indent=2\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) packages = data.get\('packages', []\) print\(f'Total: {len\(packages\)} packages'\) for p in packages: print\(p['package']\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:3000]\) except Exception as e: print\(f'Error: {e}'\) content = sys.stdin.read\(\) if hasattr\(sys.stdin, 'read'\) else '' print\(content[:500]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) p = data.get\('latest', {}\).get\('pubspec', {}\) print\('name:', p.get\('name'\)\) print\('description:', p.get\('description'\)\) print\('deps:', list\(p.get\('dependencies', {}\).keys\(\)\)\) print\('platforms:', p.get\('platforms'\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json repos = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in repos: print\(r['name'], '-', r.get\('description',''\)[:80]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) items = d.get\('items', []\) for r in items: print\(r['full_name'], '-', r.get\('description', ''\)[:80]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json items = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(items, list\): for i in items: print\(i['name']\) else: print\(json.dumps\(items, indent=2\)[:500]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json items = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(items, list\): for i in items: print\(i['name']\) else: print\(json.dumps\(items,indent=2\)[:500]\) " curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/vyuh-tech/vyuh/contents/packages/plugins")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)\)")
